summary: Tested NEW Stock Management Module (Phase 1). All 34 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all 6 navigation sections working: Dashboard, Products, Movements, Purchases, Suppliers, Categories. All CRUD operations verified.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/dashboard - returns all required fields (total_products, critical_products, total_value, rupture, faible, stock_by_category)
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/products - list with search, category filter, alert filter
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/products - create product with validation
✅ Backend: PUT /api/stock/products/{id} - update product
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/stock/products/{id} - delete product
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/products/{id} - get single product, 404 for nonexistent
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/movements - entree increases stock
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/movements - sortie decreases stock
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/movements - sortie blocked if insufficient stock
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/movements - ajustement sets exact quantity
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/movements - perte decreases stock
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/movements - list movements
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/purchases - creates purchase and updates stock
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/purchases - creates entree movement automatically
✅ Backend: CRUD /api/stock/categories - create, read, update, delete
✅ Backend: CRUD /api/stock/suppliers - create, read, update, delete
✅ Backend: POST /api/stock/seed - returns message when data exists
✅ Frontend: /stock page loads with sidebar navigation
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows 5 summary cards (Produits, Critiques, Valeur Stock, Entrees, Sorties)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows Rupture de stock alerts (red)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows Stock faible alerts (orange)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows Stock par Categorie grid
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows Derniers Mouvements list
✅ Frontend: Products page with search filter working
✅ Frontend: Products table with color-coded status (Rouge=Rupture, Orange=Faible, Vert=Normal)
✅ Frontend: New Product modal with all form fields
✅ Frontend: New Movement modal with product selector and type selector
✅ Frontend: Purchases page with table and New Purchase button
✅ Frontend: New Purchase modal with item list and auto-total
✅ Frontend: Suppliers page with 4 supplier cards (CRUD)
✅ Frontend: Categories page with 8 category cards (CRUD)
✅ Frontend: Movements page with movement history table
✅ Frontend: Retour Caisse link visible in sidebar
seed_data_creation: Seed data already present: 18 products, 8 categories, 4 suppliers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Management Module (Phase 1) fully working. Features: Dashboard with alerts, Products CRUD with filters, Movements (entree/sortie/ajustement/perte), Purchases with auto-stock update, Suppliers CRUD, Categories CRUD. All amounts in FCFA. French UI. Navigation at /stock with sidebar.

dashboard.notes: 5 summary cards, rupture/faible alerts, stock by category, recent movements

products.notes: CRUD, search filter, category filter, alert filter, color-coded status badges

purchases.notes: Create purchase with items, auto-updates stock, creates entree movements

suppliers.notes: CRUD with card layout, 4 seeded suppliers

categories.notes: CRUD with card layout, 8 seeded categories with product counts
